name: deep-harden
description: Overnight deep debugging and production hardening: critical bug hunt, security paths, regression locks
goals: Find and fix critical correctness bugs in recent verify/bot/social changes
Harden auth, rate limits, and fail-closed paths with regression tests
Document audit findings and keep verify.ps1 green

requirements.description: Deep bug hunt on recent join/verify/social diff — fix critical issues with tests
acceptance: Any critical finding has minimal fix + regression test

requirements.description: Harden verify submit: token reuse race, cache poisoning, and fail-closed social paths
acceptance: tests cover mark_token_used ordering and social fail_closed pending
No double-submit approve without token invalidation

requirements.description: Harden external API provider: timeout, no secret logging, malformed JSON fail-safe
acceptance: Malformed JSON raises SocialProfileProviderError not crash

requirements.description: Admin callback auth: details/permit/deny only from ops channel admins
acceptance: handlers reject callback when user is not channel admin where checkable
